_comment: Fleet/egress inventory for distro-rig-vps. The OPERATOR edits this; nothing here is hardcoded in the code. Phase-1 default profile is 'simulated' = deny-by-default, allow ONLY the local package cache + mock ports. block_* applies to the non-default profiles (proxied-real/open, deferred). IPv6 is blocked by default.
_comment_ca_parents: mirror_ca_parents = the EXACT registrable parent domains the cache CA's X.509 nameConstraints permit (squid ssl-bump mints wildcard-mimic leaves like *.fedoraproject.org, so the CA must permit the parent, not the exact mirror host -- DR-3). REQUIRED whenever mirror_allowlist contains any host outside the known default families (fedoraproject.org/debian.org/ubuntu.com/rockylinux.org/almalinux.org/centos.org/opensuse.org/alpinelinux.org): for anything else the installer FAILS CLOSED rather than guess a parent (last-two-labels cannot tell a registrable domain from a public suffix like co.uk/co.kr). Every mirror_allowlist host must be covered by one of these parents (host == parent or host ends .parent) or setup fails closed.
